ValidationRule.description: Application status cannot be changed manually if it is Completed - Credit Card
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Application_Status__c ) , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE( Application_Status__c ) , "Completed - Credit Card"), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Application_Status__c, "Archived")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Application Status cannot be changed manually from Completed - Credit Card
